Class Triangle

java.lang.Object
abstractFigure.Figure
abstractFigure.Triangle
public class Triangle extends Figure
A class to describe a triangle, including the module, area and perimeter values. Assume only equilateral triangles.
Since:
2026-03-29

  • Constructor Summary
